title: Paper clay geometric wall tiles set
notes: Set of nine square tiles (80 mm x 80 mm, 6 mm thick) arranged as a 3x3 grid on a wall. Each tile has a different incised geometric pattern: diagonal lines, chevrons, grid, concentric squares, triangles, hexagonal honeycomb, diamonds, dots, and a blank centre tile. Paper clay for crack resistance at cut corners. PVA sealed; mounted with double-sided foam pads.
